title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1993 (01.07.1993)
text: REGD. NO. D.L.-33004/93 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3-Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 222] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, JULY 1, 1993/ASADHA 10, 1915 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st July, 1993 G.S.R. 484(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 1 of the Passports (Amendment) Act, 1993 (35 of 1993), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of July 1993 as the date on which the said Act shall come into force. [File No. Vl/401/4,911 I . K. PONAPPA, Jt. Secy. 1 464 GI/93 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF 1NDFA : KXTRAORD1NARY [PART II—SEC. ^ti)] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st July, 1993 G.S.R. 485 (E):—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend tlie Passport Rules, 1980, namely:— 1. (i) These rules may be called the Passport (Amend- ment) Rules, 1993. (ii) They shall com? into fowj on th; date of their publication in the official gazeile. 2. In Schedule T to the Passport Rules, 1980, after the last serial No. 20, the following serial No.' and the entries relating thereto, shall be add-d in the eid namely: - (0 (2) 21. Any other official as may bs designated by the Central Government from time to time (3) Area to be specified by the Central Government from time to time [File No. VI/401/32/93] L.K. PONAPPA Jt. Secy. NOTE:— (i) Principal rubs were published vide Notification. No. GSR 691(E» dated December 11,1980 (Extra- ordinary), Part II, Section 3(i).
